raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The College of the Adaptive Arts (CAA) received a $2.2 million state investment to expand its educational programs for adults with intellectual and developmental disabilities.",
    "CAA provides equitable, college-level education to adults who have historically not had access to higher education.",
    "CAA has developed a model aimed at fostering lifelong connections and community growth for its students.",
    "CAA currently serves over 224 students across 9 states and offers more than 69 courses in various fields.",
    "CAA aspires to establish a model similar to the Special Olympics for adults with disabilities in the arts and intellectual space.",
    "The California Department of Developmental Services is the only recurring public funder of the College of the Adaptive Arts.",
    "The state investment will enhance CAA's initiatives, including the establishment of a career pipeline through partnerships with community organizations.",
    "The collaboration between CAA and West Valley College will create new opportunities for students through apprenticeships and volunteering.",
    "CAA aims to develop a sustainable and replicable model for higher education institutions globally that fosters inclusivity and equity."
  ]
}
```
